incident_description: Vehicle stolen from residential parking in Andheri West, Mumbai during the night. Discovered missing at 7 AM. No signs of forced entry to the parking area, CCTV footage from society gate shows an unknown person driving the vehicle out at approximately 2:30 AM. All original keys are with the owner. FIR filed at Andheri police station. Non-traceable certificate pending from RTO.
incident_location: Lotus Residency parking, Andheri West, Mumbai 400058
